global.description: The ad features a vibrant, abstract design with a clear call to action.
global.visual_style: bright and modern with geometric shapes
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to stream new hits weekly.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large abstract shape in the center, possibly a combination of circles and squares with a solid color background.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape positioned centrally, likely a geometric figure with a solid color.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: Another central abstract shape, possibly a rectangle or square, layered over the background.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad, likely decorative.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: Another small circular shape positioned near the bottom, complementing the previous element.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonCast' appears at the top in a bold, modern font against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font.
